posts.text:
The SAVE Act would make registering to vote an added burden for U.S. service members and their families. Hear from U.S. Army veteran (@ArmyofNaveed):

Video

To solve the U.S. housing crisis we need more new homes built like... YESTERDAY! 🏠 📈 

We have a tax policy solution that will incentivize developers to build more multifamily homes now. americanprogress.org/article…

Video

The renewed push to pass the SAVE America Act is not happening in a silo. It's just one of many acts the Trump administration is taking to manipulate election rules and take away the power of the American people to decide the outcomes of elections.
New virtual event starting in 1 hour: "Loss of Innocents: The U.S. Strike on an Iranian School and Implications for America at War." Watch live: nitter.net/i/broadcasts/1AJEmONbO…

"What is the SAVE America Act really saving us from?" @SenLBR calls out the real motive behind Trump's SAVE Act.

Video

There are ALREADY documentation requirements (SSN or driver's license number) to be able to register to vote. ‼️ 

The SAVE Act would upend this process and make every single American citizen put in the work, time, and resources to exercise their constitutional right to vote and convince the government that they’re eligible. ampr.gs/40PaPJz

The SAVE America Act is NOT about voter ID—it's a “show your papers” mandate that would force Americans to travel hours to prove IN PERSON that they are a citizen in order to register to vote or update their registration after moving.

Since enhanced ACA premium tax credits expired, premiums have more than doubled on average for the roughly 22 million people enrolled in marketplace plans.

President Trump's "TrumpRx" solution? A curated directory of manufacturer coupons, nearly all of which were already available through preexisting channels. ampr.gs/4uq9abs

Rather than pursuing policies that would restore affordable coverage for millions of Americans, the Trump administration is promoting TrumpRx as the answer to rising health care costs.
americanprogress.org/article…

It's been nearly one year since Trump's "Liberation Day," and his tariff agenda has resulted in blue-collar job losses in nearly every state while failing to boost manufacturing or close the trade deficit in goods. ampr.gs/4rCgT3w
As Trump's SAVE America Act is debated in the Senate this week, it's important you know how this anti-voter legislation threatens to silence millions at the ballot box 🗳️ ampr.gs/4rMkcpS

Retired Major General Randy Manner was traveling in the Middle East when Trump launched the attack on Iran. He was stranded in the UAE for five days after being told "we cannot help you" by the U.S. government.

Video
